text.title: AWS LLM Prompts Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the parameterised prompt artefact artefact plus valid / invalid / forbidden examples.

section.title: Schema
Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: compliance_claim_check == false (prompt or expected output contains compliance certification claim)
provider_key_scope == 'shared' (project-specific keys required for cost attribution + context isolation)

example.title: Design prompt for new serverless API
Free-form prompt with compliance claim
example.note: Multiple forbidden patterns triggered; reject and re-request.

text.reference: Validator script that enforces this contract.
